name: EngageLab Push API
description: EngageLab Push API for sending push notifications and in-app messages to devices across Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS platforms. Supports broadcast, targeted, and scheduled push campaigns with flexible targeting by tags, aliases, registration IDs, and segments.
